name: ravn-ai-toolkit
description: A la carte AI skills for LLM-assisted development across platforms

skills.name: core-coding-standards
skills.description: Universal code quality rules — KISS, DRY, clean code, code review. Base skill every project should include.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree.

skills.name: lang-typescript
skills.description: TypeScript language patterns and type safety rules — strict mode, no any, discriminated unions.

skills.name: platform-frontend
skills.description: Framework-agnostic frontend architecture — state management, components, data fetching.

skills.name: platform-backend
skills.description: Server-side architecture and security — API design, error handling, validation, logging. Use when building APIs, server logic, or reviewing backend security.

skills.name: platform-database
skills.description: SQL database design, query optimization, and migration safety.

skills.name: platform-testing
skills.description: Framework-agnostic testing principles — test philosophy, structure, mocking boundaries.

skills.name: platform-cli
skills.description: Design and implementation patterns for building command-line tools with modern UX.

skills.name: tech-react
skills.description: React-specific component, hook, and rendering patterns.

skills.name: tech-trpc
skills.description: tRPC router architecture, procedure design, and Vertical Slice Architecture patterns.

skills.name: tech-drizzle
skills.description: Drizzle ORM schema design, relational queries, and migration patterns.

skills.name: tech-vitest
skills.description: Vitest-specific testing utilities — vi.mock, vi.fn, fake timers, MSW.

skills.name: design-frontend
skills.description: Visual design system patterns for web UIs — layout, responsive, Tailwind tokens.

skills.name: design-accessibility
skills.description: WCAG AA and ARIA best practices — screen readers, keyboard navigation, focus management.

skills.name: figma-to-react-components
skills.description: Convert Figma component designs into production-ready React implementations with design token integration, accessibility via React Aria, and comprehensive documentation. Use when building React components from Figma designs, generating component implementation specs, or bridging design-to-development workflows.

skills.name: liquid-glass-ios
skills.description: Apple's Liquid Glass design system for iOS 26+ and iPadOS 26+.

skills.name: swift-concurrency
skills.description: Swift Concurrency patterns — async/await, actors, tasks, Sendable conformance.

skills.name: promptify
skills.description: Transform user requests into detailed, precise prompts for AI models.

skills.name: agent-add-rule
skills.description: Add rules, conventions, or instructions to the project's agent configuration.

skills.name: agent-init-deep
skills.description: Initialize or migrate to nested CLAUDE.md structure for progressive disclosure.

skills.name: agent-skill-creator
skills.description: Guide for creating effective, portable skills that extend Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, and tool integrations.

skills.name: agent-pr-creator
skills.description: Analyzes git diffs and commit history to intelligently fill PR templates and create pull requests via gh CLI. Use when user wants to create a PR, needs PR description help, or says 'create a pull request', 'fill PR template', 'make a PR', 'open a pull request', or mentions PR creation.

skills.name: localize-ios
skills.description: Localizes UIKit Views and ViewControllers and SwiftUI Views. Extracts hardcoded text, generates camelCase keys, replaces literals with String(localized:) or LocalizedStringKey, and creates or updates Localizable.xcstrings.

skills.name: tech-android
skills.description: Android and Kotlin development patterns — Compose, architecture, coroutines, Room, navigation, Hilt.

skills.name: rewrite-commit-history
skills.description: Rewrite a feature branch's commit history into clean conventional commits.

skills.name: pr-comments-address
skills.description: Reads open review comments from a GitHub PR, triages them, applies code fixes, and drafts reply messages. Use when user wants to address PR comments, says 'address review comments', 'fix PR feedback', 'handle PR comments', 'respond to review', or mentions addressing code review feedback on a pull request.

skills.name: type-system-audit
skills.description: Audit type-system weaknesses using bug-fix commits as evidence

skills.name: transcript-notes
skills.description: Process meeting transcripts into structured notes with metadata, TL;DR, key topics, action items, and quotes

skills.name: eval-agent-md
skills.description: Behavioral compliance testing for any CLAUDE.md or agent definition file. Auto-generates test scenarios from your rules, runs them via LLM-as-judge scoring, and reports a compliance score with per-rule pass/fail breakdown. Optionally improves failing rules via automated mutation loop.

skills.name: tech-prisma
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. Prisma ORM schema design and query patterns. Extends platform-database with Prisma-specific rules. Use when working with Prisma.

skills.name: tech-tanstack-form
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. TanStack Form patterns for type-safe form management. Extends platform-frontend with form-specific rules. Use when building forms with TanStack Form.

skills.name: tech-tanstack-router
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. TanStack Router patterns for type-safe routing. Extends platform-frontend with router-specific rules. Use when building with TanStack Router.

skills.name: design-mobile
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. Mobile-specific visual design patterns — touch targets, gestures, and platform conventions. Use when designing mobile interfaces.

skills.name: platform-mobile
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. Cross-platform mobile development patterns. Extends core-coding-standards with mobile-specific rules. Use when building mobile apps.

skills.name: tech-ios
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. iOS and Swift development patterns. Extends platform-mobile with iOS-specific rules. See swift-concurrency skill for async/await patterns and liquid-glass-ios skill for iOS 26+ UI design. Use for general iOS development guidance.

skills.name: tech-react-native
skills.description: Draft scaffold; incomplete and not for normal use. React Native development patterns. Extends platform-mobile and tech-react with React Native-specific rules. Use when building React Native apps.

skills.name: ts-linter
skills.description: Set up and enforce a strict, production-grade ESLint configuration for TypeScript projects, then systematically fix all linting issues.

drafts.name: platform-mobile
drafts.description: Cross-platform mobile development patterns — navigation, gestures, offline, performance.

drafts.name: tech-react-native
drafts.description: React Native development patterns — Expo, navigation, native modules.

drafts.name: tech-prisma
drafts.description: Prisma ORM schema design, queries, relations, and migrations.

drafts.name: tech-tanstack-router
drafts.description: TanStack Router patterns for type-safe file-based routing, loaders, and navigation.

drafts.name: tech-tanstack-form
drafts.description: TanStack Form patterns for type-safe form state, validation, and field arrays.

drafts.name: design-mobile
drafts.description: Mobile-specific visual design — touch targets, gestures, platform conventions.
